creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
The texlive-base and ps2eps ports conflict because both install the following
files:
   bin/bbox
   bin/ps2eps
   man/man1/bbox.1.gz
   man/man1/ps2eps.1.gz

These ports should be flagged as conflicting.

There don't appear to be any ports that depend on print/ps2eps.  Other than some HTML and PDF documentation, the ps2eps port doesn't install anything that isn't included in texlive-base, so it is safe for a user who runs into this conflict to deinstall ps2eps.
